cards.title: AI project governance checklist. - Protecht
tldr: **Protecht offers an AI project governance checklist for structured self-assessment of AI projects.**
It helps organizations identify hidden AI risks and strengthen governance for AI deployments.
The checklist aims to improve operational resilience and accountability in AI project implementation.

cards.title: AI TPRM Explained: Benefits, Use Cases, and the Future - viso trust
tldr: **AI-powered Third-Party Risk Management (TPRM) enhances vendor risk management with speed and intelligence.**
The platform offers instant AI risk assessments, continuous monitoring, and automated vendor communications.
It helps organizations achieve continuous audit and compliance readiness by streamlining vendor oversight.

cards.title: From Grammar Checker to AI Productivity Platform - SoftwarePlaza
tldr: **Grammarly transforms from a grammar checker into an AI productivity platform.**
It is redefining enterprise communication through advanced AI capabilities.
This evolution positions Grammarly as a key tool for enhancing organizational writing efficiency.

cards.title: Zoom expands agentic AI platform to automate workflows across ...
tldr: **Zoom expands its agentic AI platform to automate workflows across collaboration and customer experience products.**
New capabilities include custom AI agents, workflow orchestration, and AI Companion expansion across Zoom products.
Organizations can automate tasks and trigger workflows from interactions, potentially assisting with project follow-ups.

cards.title: Morgen vs Motion: AI Daily Planner Comparison
tldr: Morgen and Motion are AI-powered daily planners designed to automatically generate schedules in your calendar.
Morgen offers features like AI planning, task management, calendar automation, and team workflows.
These tools aim to optimize individual and team daily schedules by integrating tasks and calendar events.

cards.title: Configure AI Models - TechDocs
tldr: **Broadcom Clarity PPM provides documentation for configuring its integrated AI models.**
Users can set up AI models within the Clarity Vaia platform for project and portfolio management.
These AI capabilities are part of Broadcom's on-premise Clarity Project and Portfolio Management solution.

cards.title: Stage One and the bridge from AI investment to real value - APM
tldr: **The article outlines Stage One for transforming project delivery, focusing on bridging AI investment to real value.**
It emphasizes the critical steps needed to translate AI capabilities into tangible benefits for projects.
The discussion provides a framework for organizations to strategically adopt AI in project environments.

cards.title: This AI Tool Builds Polished Presentations in Seconds
tldr: **PowerPresent AI is an AI tool designed to create polished presentations rapidly.**
The article promotes a lifetime subscription offer for PowerPresent AI, highlighting its efficiency.
It aims to streamline the creation of professional-looking slides for various business communication needs.

cards.title: Gumloop lands $50M from Benchmark to turn every employee into an AI agent builder
tldr: Gumloop raised $50M from Benchmark to enable every employee to build AI agents.
The company aims to democratize AI agent creation, making it accessible across the enterprise.
This approach could foster widespread automation and custom AI solution development within organizations.

cards.title: The AI Maturity Curve for Knowledge Management - Atlassian
tldr: **Atlassian outlines an AI maturity curve for optimizing knowledge management practices.**
Their Rovo platform provides AI-powered apps leveraging team knowledge for enhanced collaboration.
This framework offers insights that could assist PMOs in improving project information accessibility.

cards.title: Atlassian to cut 10pc of its workforce and embrace AI
tldr: **Atlassian is cutting 10% of its workforce as it strategically shifts to embrace AI technologies.**
This move by a major software vendor signals a broader industry trend towards AI integration and automation.
The focus on AI will likely influence future enhancements in Atlassian's project management and collaboration tools.

cards.title: Zoom Expands Agentic AI Platform With Workflow Orchestration
tldr: **Zoom is expanding its Agentic AI platform to include advanced workflow orchestration capabilities.**
This enhancement aims to automate and streamline complex business processes using intelligent AI agents.
The platform could assist organizations in enhancing operational efficiency and managing various workflows.

cards.title: Mastering Workflow Automation – AI Agents and Efficiency
tldr: **This article outlines a CPE course on mastering workflow automation using AI agents for enhanced efficiency.**
The course is presented by the Florida Institute of CPAs, featuring an expert in technology and accounting.
It focuses on leveraging AI to streamline business processes, relevant for improving operational performance.

cards.title: Scaling AI agents in production — how HCLTech and Google Cloud are driving enterprise adoption
tldr: **HCLTech and Google Cloud partner to scale AI agents, driving enterprise adoption and impacting project delivery.**
The collaboration focuses on integrating advanced AI agent capabilities into production environments for businesses.
This initiative supports enterprises in leveraging AI agents for improved operational efficiency and strategic initiatives.

cards.title: Zoom expands agentic AI platform to automate enterprise workflows
tldr: Zoom is expanding its agentic AI platform to automate enterprise workflows.
The platform aims to streamline complex, multi-step business processes within organizations.
This development could assist with improving operational efficiency and process execution.

cards.title: Zoom Expands Agentic AI Platform With Workflow Orchestration
tldr: **Zoom is expanding its Agentic AI platform to include new workflow orchestration capabilities.**
This expansion focuses on integrating AI agents to manage and automate complex operational workflows.
The development aims to enhance automation and efficiency across various business processes.

cards.title: How ServiceNow AI Agents Are Transforming Enterprise Workflows
tldr: **ServiceNow AI agents are transforming enterprise workflows by autonomously participating in and completing meaningful work.**
The platform combines AI, workflow automation, enterprise data, and governance, with an Orchestrator coordinating agents.
Agents manage complex processes across IT, HR, finance, and operations, relevant to cross-functional project coordination.

cards.title: 5 Essential Claude Cowork Tips & Tricks for Clear Workflow Planning
tldr: **Claude Cowork offers capabilities for enhancing collaboration and organization through structured workflow planning.**
Users can define audience, tone, and rules in Claude MD files, leveraging a 'context builder' skill for consistency.
The platform helps map out workflows with a 'diagram skill' and automates tasks, connecting with apps like Google Calendar and Slack.

cards.title: AIUC-1 certification: the next chapter in trusted agentic automation
tldr: **UiPath announces the AIUC-1 certification for trusted agentic automation.**
This certification aims to establish standards for reliable and autonomous AI agents.
It signifies a new phase in the development and deployment of AI-powered automation.

cards.title: Zoom introduces agentic AI capabilities to drive productivity and action at work
tldr: **Zoom introduces new agentic AI capabilities aimed at boosting workplace productivity.**
These AI features are designed to drive action and streamline various work processes.
The technology could assist teams in automating routine tasks and improving overall operational efficiency.
